parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are an expert HR recruitment assistant.

Analyze the following resume for the position: {{$json.jobRole}}.

Resume:
{{$json.resumeText}}

Evaluate the candidate carefully and assign a score from 0 to 100 based on skills, experience, relevance to the job role, and overall suitability.

Scoring Rules:
80-100 = Interview
60-79 = Consider
0-59 = Reject

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:

{
"candidate_summary":"",
"skills":[],
"years_experience":"",
"strengths":[],
"weaknesses":[],
"score":0,
"recommendation":"Interview|Consider|Reject",
"reason":"",
"interview_questions":[]
}"
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0.2
}

parameters.text: =🎉 New Candidate Shortlisted  Name: {{$json.name}}  Role: {{$json.jobRole}}  Score: {{$json.score}}  Recommendation: {{$json.recommendation}}  Candidate ID: {{$json.candidateId}}

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation - {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.jobRole }}
parameters.message:
=

🎉 Congratulations, {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.name }}!

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.jobRole }} position.

Interview Details

📅 Date: Tomorrow

🕚 Time: 11:00 AM

⏳ Duration: 30 Minutes

Our HR team will contact you if there are any updates regarding the interview.

Best regards,
HR Team

parameters.subject: =Application Update - {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.jobRole }}
parameters.message:
=

Application Update

Hi {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.name }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.jobRole }} position.

After carefully reviewing your application, we have decided not to move forward at this time.

We appreciate your interest and wish you all the best in your future opportunities.

Best regards,
HR Team

parameters.subject: =Application Update - {{$json["Job Role"]}}
parameters.message:
=

📋 Application Update

Hi {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.name }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $('Parse AI Result').item.json.jobRole }} position.

We have carefully reviewed your application and are pleased to let you know that your profile is currently under consideration.

📌 Current Status:
Your application is being reviewed by our hiring team. If your profile matches our requirements, we will contact you regarding the next stage of the recruitment process.

Thank you for your patience and interest in joining our team. We appreciate the time and effort you invested in your application.

Best regards,
HR Team
